title: aliella helichrysoides
intro: Aliella helichrysoides, also known as Helichrysum cymosum, is a flowering plant species native to Australia, known for its yellow, daisy-like flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Aliella helichrysoides include reducing inflammation and promoting healing, as well as potential uses in treating anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
